mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, request_id, client_id, client_code, capability_id, capability_code, capability_version, actor_type, actor_user_id, service_user_id, active_org_id, result_status, result_code, error_code, schema_path, trace_id, duration_ms, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_capability_invocation_log ( id, tenant_id, request_id, client_id, client_code, capability_id, capability_code, capability_version, actor_type, actor_user_id, service_user_id, active_org_id, result_status, result_code, error_code, schema_path, trace_id, duration_ms, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{log.id}, #{log.tenantId}, #{log.requestId}, #{log.clientId}, #{log.clientCode}, #{log.capabilityId}, #{log.capabilityCode}, #{log.capabilityVersion}, #{log.actorType}, #{log.actorUserId}, #{log.serviceUserId}, #{log.activeOrgId}, #{log.resultStatus}, #{log.resultCode}, #{log.errorCode}, #{log.schemaPath}, #{log.traceId}, #{log.durationMs}, 0, #{log.createBy}, COALESCE(#{log.createTime}, NOW()), #{log.createDept}, #{log.updateBy}, COALESCE(#{log.updateTime}, NOW()) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = ai_capability_invocation_log.id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_capability_invocation_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND request_id = #{requestId} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
